responses.reasoning: NUE is severely overbought (RSI 86.9) with price at 52-week highs and no bullish MACD crossover to confirm continuation. The lack of earnings beats (0/4Q) contradicts the strength of the rally. While ADX is strong and volume supports the move, the extreme RSI divergence and elevated position near resistance ($225.11 = MA200) create asymmetric risk-reward favoring a pullback to MA20 support ($192.97).
key_signals: Strong ADX but no golden cross
